perspective.title: 3D-fold / perspective / z-composite
perspective.note: Camera-bearing caps isolate the perspective projection (Y/X fold, Z push) vs FCP. Camera-less would be a FALSE FAIL (headless!=GUI); every persp.* cap inserts a real Camera so headless is a valid oracle. Minimized Switch/Smear are node-level real-slug repros.

replicator.title: Replicator / clone-grid
replicator.note: The replicator pinwheel/grid is barely composited (ROADMAP: 'broken single-tile spin on black' vs FCP's full multi-blade replicator). Minimized Clone_Spin/Concentric/Video_Wall are the node-level FCP repros. Caps pack builds a minimal Replicator grid vs FCP.
replicator.oracle_note: ORACLE GAP (found 2026-07-23): the minimized Video_Wall/Clone_Spin/Concentric cases have their Replicator scenenodes STRIPPED by `fct minimize` (the <factory> 'Replicator' description remains but the scenenode is gone), so they parse to camera/group/image with ZERO replicator layers — replicator.ts (generateInstances / renderReplicatorLayer) is never exercised and min-score cannot measure a change. AND the pinwheel/grid fix is CROSS-LANE: the decoded generateInstances bug (Shape branch ignores `arrangement`, stacking grid cells at origin — commit 674f98a) regresses Video_Wall in isolation because the mis-posed dolly camera + retime-wrap playhead (framing.ts / timemap.ts, OTHER files) frame a region derived from the current stacked geometry. A faithful replicator fix needs (a) a re-minimized case that RETAINS a live Replicator node, and (b) the camera-framing lane co-tuned. Single-subsystem isolation is insufficient for this subsystem.

panels.title: kinetic-panel / gradient / mask
panels.note: Panel layout + image-mask reveal + gradient generator. Minimized Lower/Slide_In are node-level FCP repros. NOTE: Light_Sweep/Up-Over crash headless FCP (SIGSEGV) so those lack a headless oracle — use the minimized cases + caps, not those slugs directly.
